name: superhuman-ops
description: Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP (tasks, projects, workload, documents) and installs the start-task / post-comment task workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Operations tasks + the start/post task workflow.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP and installs the start-task and post-comment skills. Operational surface only — no finance, sales, or people money. Requires a SUPERHUMAN_MCP_TOKEN env var (ask the founder for a token).
defaultPrompt: Start task <paste a task link> and walk me through it.
Summarise this task and post the result for review.
What's overdue across projects this week?
